name: Singapore Intercultural School South Jakarta

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Bona Vista Raya, Lebak Bulus, Cilandak, Jakarta Selatan, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Singapore-curriculum school in Bona Vista. Small, focused on Singaporean standards. Appeals to families wanting Singapore's academic rigour.
paragraphs: Singapore-curriculum school in Bona Vista. Small, focused on Singaporean standards. Appeals to families wanting Singapore's academic rigour.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$2.4K – US$15K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Campus in Jakarta Garden City, Science laboratories, Computer labs, Libraries, Sports facilities.
